category_sources: Official hexer documentation describes it as a multi-buffer editor for binary files on Unix-like systems.
source_facts.description says hexer is a terminal hex editor with a vi-like interface.
display_name_sources: Official hexer documentation uses the title hexer.
docs_sources: Official hexer page links to the ReadTheDocs copy and says the documentation is hosted at Ringlet with a ReadTheDocs copy.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official hexer homepage, which links to the GitLab repository and says the project is developed there.
tags_sources: Official hexer documentation says it edits binary files and displays buffers as hex dumps.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal hex editor with vi-like interface.
